sentence_3: 街道办公室帮助大家解决问题。
translation_3: The residential office helps everyone solve problems.

sentence_1: 节假日的时候很多人旅游。
translation_1: Many people travel during public holidays.
translation_2: Everyone goes traveling during public holidays.
translation_3: Stores have sales on public holidays.

translation_1: We need to economize on water use.
sentence_2: 他养成了节约的好习惯。
translation_2: He developed a good habit of economizing.
sentence_3: 节约用电对环境有好处。
translation_3: Economizing on electricity is good for the environment.

translation_1: We need to conserve electricity.
sentence_2: 节约食物是大家的责任。
translation_2: Conserving food is everyone's responsibility.
translation_3: He thought of ways to conserve time.

sentence_1: 比赛的结果让人很高兴。
translation_1: The outcome of the competition was very pleasing.
translation_2: The outcome of this matter was not great.
translation_3: They are watching for the final outcome.

translation_1: The exam results are out.
translation_2: The results of this exam are very good.
translation_3: This result satisfied everyone.

sentence_1: 他努力学习，结果考了第一。
translation_1: He studied hard; as a result, he came first in the exam.
translation_2: He was careless; as a result, he fell down.
sentence_3: 我们努力了，结果成功了。
translation_3: We worked hard; as a result, we succeeded.

sentence_1: 他没好好准备，结果没通过考试。
translation_1: He didn't prepare well; consequently, he didn't pass the exam.
sentence_2: 下了大雨，结果比赛取消了。
translation_2: It rained heavily; consequently, the competition was cancelled.
sentence_3: 她迟到了，结果错过了火车。
translation_3: She was late; consequently, she missed the train.

translation_1: The apple tree has borne fruit.
sentence_2: 这棵树今年第一次结果。
translation_2: This tree bore fruit for the first time this year.
sentence_3: 种了三年，树终于结果了。
translation_3: After three years of planting, the tree finally bore fruit.

definition: to settle the bill; to check out; to pay
sentence_1: 服务员，我们可以结账了吗？
translation_1: Excuse me, could we have the bill please?
sentence_2: 他去前台结账，然后离开了酒店。
translation_2: He went to the front desk to check out, then left the hotel.
sentence_3: 结账的时候能用手机吗？
translation_3: Can I use my phone when paying the bill?

sentence_1: 老师解释了这道题的答案。
translation_1: The teacher explained the answer to this question.
sentence_2: 他向我解释了这个词的意思。
translation_2: He explained the meaning of this word to me.
translation_3: Please explain your idea.

sentence_1: 今后我要更加努力学习。
translation_1: Henceforth I will study even harder.
translation_2: Henceforth, please pay attention to safety.
translation_3: Henceforth we must keep in contact often.

sentence_1: 从现在开始，今后要好好吃饭。
translation_1: Starting now, from now on eat properly.
translation_2: What are your plans from now on?
sentence_3: 今后我不会再犯同样的错误。
translation_3: From now on I won't make the same mistake again.

sentence_1: 这件事仅他一个人知道。
translation_1: Only he alone knows about this matter.
translation_2: There are only two seats left here.
translation_3: Just this one is not enough.
